title: Abominable Deer Man goes to cemetery with no primary creature

card.rawText: If your opponent uses a Lightning card, play this card from your hand to your side of the field as a Limited Summon. This card is sent to the cemetery if you have no primary creature on the field.

effect.value: Send to cemetery if you have no primary creature

plan.title: Abominable Deer Man goes to cemetery with no primary creature
plan.summary: Verify Abominable Deer Man source-linked cleanup sends itself to cemetery if its controller has no primary creature.

This card is sent to the cemetery if you have no primary creature on the field.

steps: Seed Abominable Deer Man as a Limited Summon.
